item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 13,088 words across all notes.

item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes Baseball choke Two grip choke on turtle Close guard overhook stiff Crusifix Straight ankle lock Grip break on upper back Cross collar grip break to takedown Collar grip break downward Double ankle grab pass Closed guard standing up Double under Closed guard figure 8 Toreando Leg drag ...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Canto choke Kimura Estima lock Gogoplata North south Hook Double leg Rubber guard .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes README Formatting index Kimura & Americana Three sisters Buggy choke Bow and arrow Windshield wiper choke Papercutter Canto choke .

item.title: Sacrifice elbow drop
item.description: General Steps Ideally obtain: Left hand grips opponent sleeve Right hand grips cross collar Push on collar with stiff arm Sleeve pulling downward Inverse the motion to backward Drop to “hiihtoliike” with legs Pull back on the collar hand and land on elbow Move sleeve grip to opponents thigh Turn ove...

item.title: The Drop
item.description: General Move where you control the opponents arm and have their posture broken over your back.

item.title: Shin Trip
item.description: General There is not a clear naming convention for the trip, but they encompass all moves that are blocking one of opponents legs ankle and finishing the sweep by leaning towards them Typically started from Arm drag and attacking the closer leg by curving your leg from either side and laying the shi...

item.title: Uchi Mata
item.description: General Literally translates to inner-thigh reaping throw. Extremely common in judo.

item.title: Lockdown Sweep
item.description: Control opponents leg tightly Outer leg goes inward behind the opponents knee Inner leg locks the leg in place (Similar method as in Triangle) Inner legs Instep locks the opponents leg in a hook.

item.title: Sun sweep
item.description: General Weird sweep where you have sleeve grip the same side.
